name: North Media A/S
summary: North Media A/S engages in the media business in Denmark. The company disseminates offers and information to various Danish consumers through minetilbud.dk; and distributes advertising materials, leaflets, local newspapers, and direct mails. It also provides logistical services, including packing leaflets for local Danish clients and for Deutsche Post. In addition, the company invests in, develops, and operates digital platforms that market and arrange rented housing, jobs, and loans. Further, it develops and supplies secure digital access solutions for professionals and home users. The company was formerly known as S√É¬∏ndagsavisen a-s and changed its name to North Media A/S in April 2010. North Media A/S was founded in 1965 and is based in S√É¬∏borg, Denmark.
